mnemonics: My Insurance Makes Big Elections Triggered
keyPoints: An Intent is a message sent from one component to another in Android
Intent Filters are used to match an intent with a component
Activity Life Cycle: 1. New, 2. Created, 3. Resumed, 4. Paused, 5. Stopped, 6. Destroyed
Broadcast Life Cycle: 1. Received, 2. Processing, 3. Sent, 4. Cancelled, 5. Forgotten
